testflight_beta.description: Archive, export, upload, and distribute LinXApple to a TestFlight group.

steps.name: beta_validate_env
steps.run: if [ -z "$APP_ID" ]; then echo "APP_ID is required" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then echo "VERSION is required" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ -z "$TESTFLIGHT_GROUP" ]; then echo "TESTFLIGHT_GROUP is required" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ "$CONFIRM" != "1" ]; then echo "CONFIRM=1 is required for TestFlight publish" >&2; exit 1; fi

steps.name: beta_archive
steps.run: XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS=""; if [ -n "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH:-}" ]; then if [ -z "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID:-}" ] || [ -z "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID:-}" ]; then echo "ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID and ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID are required when ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH is set" >&2; exit 1; fi; XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS="--xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyPath --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH --xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyID --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID --xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyIssuerID --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID"; fi; asc xcode archive --project "$PROJECT_PATH" --scheme "$SCHEME" --configuration "$CONFIGURATION" --archive-path "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/LinXApple-$VERSION-${steps.beta_resolve_next_build.BUILD_NUMBER}.xcarchive" --clean --overwrite --xcodebuild-flag=-destination --xcodebuild-flag=generic/platform=iOS --xcodebuild-flag=-allowProvisioningUpdates $XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS --xcodebuild-flag=MARKETING_VERSION=$VERSION --xcodebuild-flag=CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION=${steps.beta_resolve_next_build.BUILD_NUMBER} --output json

steps.name: beta_export
steps.run: XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS=""; if [ -n "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH:-}" ]; then if [ -z "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID:-}" ] || [ -z "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID:-}" ]; then echo "ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID and ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID are required when ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH is set" >&2; exit 1; fi; XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS="--xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyPath --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH --xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyID --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID --xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyIssuerID --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID"; fi; asc xcode export --archive-path ${steps.beta_archive.ARCHIVE_PATH} --export-options "$EXPORT_OPTIONS" --ipa-path "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/LinXApple-$VERSION-${steps.beta_archive.BUILD_NUMBER}.ipa" --overwrite --xcodebuild-flag=-allowProvisioningUpdates $XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS --output json

steps.name: beta_publish
steps.run: SUBMIT_FLAGS=""; if [ "$SUBMIT_BETA_REVIEW" = "1" ]; then SUBMIT_FLAGS="--submit --confirm"; fi; asc publish testflight --app "$APP_ID" --ipa ${steps.beta_export.IPA_PATH} --group "$TESTFLIGHT_GROUP" --wait --poll-interval 10s $SUBMIT_FLAGS --output json

appstore_release.description: Archive, export, upload, attach, and submit LinXApple for App Store review.

steps.name: appstore_validate_env
steps.run: if [ -z "$APP_ID" ]; then echo "APP_ID is required" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then echo "VERSION is required" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ "$CONFIRM" != "1" ]; then echo "CONFIRM=1 is required for App Store submission" >&2; exit 1; fi

steps.name: appstore_archive
steps.run: XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS=""; if [ -n "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH:-}" ]; then if [ -z "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID:-}" ] || [ -z "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID:-}" ]; then echo "ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID and ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID are required when ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH is set" >&2; exit 1; fi; XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS="--xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyPath --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH --xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyID --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID --xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyIssuerID --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID"; fi; asc xcode archive --project "$PROJECT_PATH" --scheme "$SCHEME" --configuration "$CONFIGURATION" --archive-path "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/LinXApple-$VERSION-${steps.appstore_resolve_next_build.BUILD_NUMBER}.xcarchive" --clean --overwrite --xcodebuild-flag=-destination --xcodebuild-flag=generic/platform=iOS --xcodebuild-flag=-allowProvisioningUpdates $XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS --xcodebuild-flag=MARKETING_VERSION=$VERSION --xcodebuild-flag=CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION=${steps.appstore_resolve_next_build.BUILD_NUMBER} --output json

steps.name: appstore_export
steps.run: XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS=""; if [ -n "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH:-}" ]; then if [ -z "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID:-}" ] || [ -z "${ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID:-}" ]; then echo "ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID and ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID are required when ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH is set" >&2; exit 1; fi; XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS="--xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyPath --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_PATH --xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyID --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ID --xcodebuild-flag=-authenticationKeyIssuerID --xcodebuild-flag=$ASC_XCODEBUILD_AUTH_KEY_ISSUER_ID"; fi; asc xcode export --archive-path ${steps.appstore_archive.ARCHIVE_PATH} --export-options "$EXPORT_OPTIONS" --ipa-path "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/LinXApple-$VERSION-${steps.appstore_archive.BUILD_NUMBER}.ipa" --overwrite --xcodebuild-flag=-allowProvisioningUpdates $XCODEBUILD_AUTH_FLAGS --output json
